title: 荣誉附件正文｜LOA Combine（第11部分）
content:
oks and specialised journals purchased with the grant must be properly tagged by the Library.

With effect from Jan 2014, reimbursement claims for books with a value of more than S$50 (before GST) must be acknowledged and signed off by the University’s Library before the Office of Finance can process such claims. For electronic books and electronic journals, please ensure that Library does not have existing copies prior to the purchase. Customs and Allowable Import Duties Only if it is specifically related to importation of consumables and equipment purchased with the TL Research Grant. Temasek Laboratories @ SUTD Page 7 Circular – Temasek Lab Grants Date: April 2018 Type of Description Expenses Entertainment & Allowable Refreshment In accordance with SUTD’s Refreshments and Entertainment guidelines. Fines and Not allowable Penalties GST Allowable For expenses incurred with purchases made with the TL Research Grant. Note: If there are GST included in the expenses, select tax code STD-PA in iExpense when submitting the claims (do not select STD-NC) so that the system will compute the applicable GST from the claim amount accordingly. Insurance Not allowable Premiums The University is responsible for the insurance of the equipment, relevant workmen compensation and professional indemnity insurance which are in line with the University’s risk policies. Legal Fees Not allowable Overhead Allowable Expenses - Rental, Utilities, Only for DIRP projects as those allow 20% overheads. Telephone Charges, TL direct grant, TRF and SEED projects do not allow any overheads. Facilities Management, etc Photocopying Allowable Charges Professional Not allowable Fees (including Fees to Consultants) Professional Not allowable Membership Fees for PIs / RFs / RAs Funded by the Grant Publications Not allowable Unless the contents have been cleared with Program Manager / TL Office Temasek Laboratories @ SUTD Page 8 Circular – Temasek Lab Grants Date: April 2018 Type of Description Expenses Publications charges can only be supported if it is specifically tied to the deliverables. Purchase of Lab Allowable Supplies, Consumables, The cost of the use of the services and central facilities owned by the Animals, Use of University (e. g. central laboratory services) are allowable and must be Services or Lab based on the University’s fee schedules which are consistently applied Spaces within regardless of the source of funds. the Host Institution’s Central Facilities Lab Safety Allowable Training and Related Only if the University’s Office of Environment, Health and Safety (EHS) have Expenses not already conducted such training. Justification for the training budget should be provided. Other Training Allowable, if the training will benefit the research that the grant intended to and Related support. Justification should be provided. Expenses General training are not allowable. These are covered by funds for staff development. Repairs and Allowable, if equipment is used extensively for the research that the grant is Maintenance of intended to support. Research Equipment The period of maintenance funded from the research grant should be restricted to the duration of the project.
